issue_trigger: The debate over whether character stigmatization is real or ideological feels personal: your own name has a female-radical character that was mocked.
court_specific_goal: Share how the academic debate between linguistics and ideology maps onto lived experience of being a woman with a stigmatized-name character, express whether the gender framing resonates regardless of scholarly precision, and reflect on whether lived gendered experience validates the thesis even when the academic evidence is contested.
